description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Windows Releases that runs on push to master, actions, and tags. The workflow has two main jobs: build and upload_aviutl_release. The build job runs on windows-2019, checks out the repository, sets up CUDA, and builds the project using MSBuild. It then creates an archive of the build output and uploads it as a release asset. The upload_aviutl_release job also runs on windows-2019, downloads the build artifact, and creates a package for Aviutl.
